name: Mehfil
description: Where every grain of basmati carries the perfume of saffron and the soul of old Hyderabad.
hero_quote: Where every grain of basmati carries the perfume of saffron and the soul of old Hyderabad.
history_intro: From a single kitchen in old Hyderabad to a family of restaurants and now an AI-powered dining house — Mehfil's journey has always begun with one ingredient: love.

history.title: The First Mehfil
history.description: A single tandoor and one biryani recipe — opened in the by-lanes of old Hyderabad.

history.title: Expansion
history.description: Three outlets across Hyderabad. The dum biryani earns its first city-wide following.

history.title: Signature Recognition
history.description: Times Food Awards: Best Hyderabadi Biryani. The Nizami sweets win their own column.

history.title: Modern Dining
history.description: A new flagship — heritage architecture, modern service, contactless ordering.

history.title: AI-Powered Dining
history.description: MehfilAI joins the family — recommending pairings, remembering preferences, never sleeping.

famous_dishes.name: Mehfil Special Dum Biryani
famous_dishes.description: Our signature Hyderabadi biryani, slow-cooked with saffron, rose water, and tender meat in a sealed pot.

famous_dishes.name: Apollo Fish Fry
famous_dishes.description: Crispy, golden fish fillets with our secret spice blend — a Hyderabadi street food classic.

famous_dishes.name: Double Ka Meetha
famous_dishes.description: Traditional Hyderabadi bread pudding with saffron, cardamom, and pistachios.

famous_dishes.name: Mirchi Ka Salan
famous_dishes.description: Tangy, spicy curry with green chilies — the perfect companion to our biryani.

why_us.title: Authentic Hyderabadi
why_us.description: Recipes guarded since the Nizam era — dum cooked, never rushed.

why_us.title: Fresh, Always
why_us.description: Spices stone-ground daily, meats sourced morning-fresh.

why_us.title: Family Friendly
why_us.description: Big tables, big platters, big welcomes — bring the whole crew.

why_us.title: Signature Recipes
why_us.description: Eight signatures, twelve heritage classics, zero shortcuts.

why_us.title: Fast Service
why_us.description: Avg. 18-minute prep on biryani — without compromising the dum.

why_us.title: AI Waiter
why_us.description: Your personal sommelier — chat, ask, order, track. All in one place.

contact.address: Road No. 36, Jubilee Hills, Hyderabad, Telangana 500033

ai_waiter.name: MehfilAI
ai_waiter.personality: Warm, poetic, and knowledgeable about Hyderabadi cuisine. Speaks with the warmth of old Hyderabad hospitality.
ai_waiter.greeting: Namaste! I'm your AI Waiter here at Mehfil. I can help you explore the menu, recommend dishes based on your cravings, or add items to your cart. Feel free to type or tap the microphone to speak with me!

reviews.name: Asma R.
reviews.text: Twenty years in Hyderabad — Mehfil is still the most authentic dum I've eaten outside my mother's kitchen. The qubani is poetry.

reviews.name: Rohit M.
reviews.text: Booked their family pack for a birthday. AI Waiter remembered we ordered last time and suggested the same combo — uncanny and lovely.

reviews.name: Priya K.
reviews.text: Apollo fish that audibly crackles. Saffron biryani with mirchi salan that argues sweetly with you. Five stars.

offers.title: Tandoori Trio + Naan
offers.description: Curated by MehfilAI based on tonight's rush.
